description: Unit test specifications for the Swipe utility, testing swipe gestures, event handling, and support detection.

methods.name: clearPointerEvents
methods.description: Clears the PointerEvent support by setting window.PointerEvent to null.

methods.name: restorePointerEvents
methods.description: Restores the original PointerEvent support in window.

methods.name: defineDocumentElementOntouchstart
methods.description: Defines a dummy ontouchstart handler on document.documentElement.

methods.name: deleteDocumentElementOntouchstart
methods.description: Removes the dummy ontouchstart handler from document.documentElement.

methods.name: mockSwipeGesture
methods.description: Simulates a swipe gesture on an element with specified options and type.
